name: Verinag Spring & Garden
description: A magnificent octagonal stone basin filled with crystal clear, emerald-green water, officially recognized as the primary source of the mighty Jhelum River.
history: The basin and the surrounding arcade were built by Emperor Jahangir in 1620, while the beautiful garden was laid out by Emperor Shah Jahan.
famousFor: Source of Jhelum river, Mughal architecture, crystal clear water.
